document.name: Bamba Marha
document.shortDescription: Gourmet burger bar near the university — craft patties, local beers, and late hours on Október 23. utca.
document.longDescription:
Bamba Marha on Október 23. utca serves thick gourmet burgers and craft beer taps popular with students from BME across the Danube. The casual room stays open for post-concert crowds from A38. Menu on bambamarha.hu.

Sources: https://www.bambamarha.hu/
